items.summary: Create a new top-level page component `JenkinsPublicSite.tsx` that assembles the entire Jenkins Insurance Agency single-page demo site. Set the document title to exactly: 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'. Register this page as the index route in App.tsx, replacing the current default route.

Build a quote request + contact section on a navy gradient background. Left side: a quote form with fields for Full Name, Phone, Email, ZIP Code, Coverage Type (dropdown), and Best Time to Call, plus a gold submit button. Right side: a contact info card showing address '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', phone '(281) 410-8934', business hours, and a WhatsApp link. Assign this section the anchor id='quote'.

Build a Spanish/bilingual section with a brief message in both English and Spanish inviting Spanish-speaking clients to get a free quote. Example: 'Hablamos Español — Se Habla Español. Llámenos hoy para una cotización gratuita.' Include a call-to-action button linking to tel:(281)410-8934.

Build a 3-column footer with: Column 1 — Jenkins Insurance logo, tagline, address '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', phone '(281) 410-8934'. Column 2 — Quick Links (Coverage types). Column 3 — Service Areas (The Woodlands, Conroe, Spring, Tomball, Humble, Cypress TX). Bottom strip: copyright, license disclaimer, privacy policy link. Background: dark navy.

Implement a floating WhatsApp button (bottom-right, fixed position) that is visible and accessible on ALL screen sizes — desktop, tablet, and mobile. It must use a WhatsApp green circle with a WhatsApp icon and a pulsing animation ring. The link must open `https://wa.me/12814108934` in a new tab. The button must NOT be hidden at any breakpoint.

Implement a mobile sticky bottom action bar (fixed, bottom of screen, mobile-only) with two buttons side-by-side: 'Call Now' linking to tel:(281)410-8934 and 'Get Quote' scrolling to #quote. This bar should only appear on screens ≤768px wide.

Apply global design system: primary font Montserrat (headings), secondary font Open Sans (body), loaded from Google Fonts. Primary color Navy #1B3A6B, accent Gold #F4B942, success Green #27AE60. All section scroll-in animations use IntersectionObserver with a 0.1 threshold and translateY(30px) → translateY(0) + opacity fade. All CSS custom properties defined in index.css for the Jenkins brand.

Ensure the entire frontend bundle is optimized for sub-3-second load time on mobile: lazy-load any images, use lightweight SVG icons instead of icon libraries where possible, minimize third-party script dependencies, and ensure no blocking render resources.

Build a sticky responsive navigation header with navy (#1B3A6B) background. Include the Jenkins Insurance logo/wordmark on the left, desktop nav links (Home, Coverage, About, Reviews, Contact), a visible phone number '(281) 410-8934' as a clickable tel: link, a gold 'Get Free Quote' CTA button, and a hamburger menu for mobile that opens a slide-down drawer. Header should gain a drop shadow on scroll.

Build a full-screen hero section with a two-column layout. Left column: H1 headline 'Your Local Insurance Agent in The Woodlands, TX', subheadline copy establishing trust, two CTA buttons ('Get Your Free Quote' and 'Call (281) 410-8934'), and 3 inline trust badges (No Setup Fees, 5-Day Launch, 30-Day Guarantee). Right column: floating agent photo placeholder with a gold border frame, a floating Google review card showing 4.9★. Background: navy-to-dark-navy gradient. The very first 10 words visible on mobile must communicate immediate value to a Texas insurance agent prospect.

Build a gold (#F4B942) trust bar below the hero with 4 animated count-up stats: '500+ Families Served', '4.9★ Google Rating', '20+ Carrier Partners', '100% Local Texas Agent'. Stats animate from 0 to final value when scrolled into view using IntersectionObserver.

Build a carrier partner badge row showing logos/name badges for: Progressive, Travelers, Nationwide, Liberty Mutual, Safeco, and Foremost. Use grayscale badges that colorize on hover. Include a heading 'Trusted Carrier Partners'.

Build a 'Why Choose Jenkins Insurance' section with 3 cards in a row. Cards: (1) Independent Agent — Access to 20+ carriers for the best rates, (2) Local The Woodlands Expert — Knows the TX market personally, (3) Personalized Service — Real agent, not a call center. Each card has an icon, title, body copy, and a lift+shadow hover effect. Section background: white or light cream.

Build a 3×2 coverage types grid with 6 cards: Home Insurance, Auto Insurance, Business Insurance, Flood Insurance, RV Insurance, Life Insurance. Each card has a relevant icon, short description, and a 'Get a Quote' link that scrolls to the contact form. Use navy card headers and white card bodies.

Build a navy 'About C. Jenkins' section. Left side: agent photo placeholder, credential badges (Licensed TX Agent, Independent Broker, 10+ Years Experience). Right side: personal story copy about serving The Woodlands TX community, 3 inline stat boxes (Families Served, Carriers, Years). Background: navy #1B3A6B with white/gold text.

Build a Google Reviews section showing an aggregate rating summary (4.9/5, 47 reviews) and 3 testimonial cards. Each card includes a reviewer name, star rating (5★), review text relevant to Texas insurance needs, and a 'Posted on Google' badge. Use IntersectionObserver for staggered fade-in animation on scroll.
